description:
DEPRECATED
This endpoint has been deprecated, it will be sunset at 9/1/2024. Instead, please use rest/v1.1/companies/{company_id}/custom_field_definitions

parameters.name: view
parameters.description:
The extended view provides what is shown below.
The default view returns the same as the extended view but excludes the attribute custom_field_lov_entries.
The with_lov_entries view is the same as ...

parameters.name: tool_name
parameters.description: The name of the company/project level tool that is allowed read permissions to custom field definitions.

parameters.name: includes_configurable_field_sets_count
parameters.description: If true, response will include the number of field sets using item (custom field).

parameters.name: filters[with_label]
parameters.description: Return custom field definitions that label contains text

parameters.name: scope[type]
parameters.description: Return custom field definitions that contains fieldset type

parameters.name: scope[category]
parameters.description: Return custom field definitions that contains category

parameters.name: scope[observations_category_id]
parameters.description: Return custom field definitions that contains observations_category_id

parameters.name: scope[inspection_type_id]
parameters.description: Return custom field definitions that contains inspection_type_id

parameters.name: scope[generic_tool_id]
parameters.description: Return custom field definitions that contains generic_tool_id

parameters.name: scope[action_plan_type_id]
parameters.description: Return custom field definitions that contains action_plan_type_id

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Direction (asc/desc) can be controlled by the presence or absence of '-' before the sort parameter.
